---
title: "Cronograma de aulas"
---

::: titulo-nao-numerado
Cronograma de aulas (em constante atualização)
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(googlesheets4)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)

# Desativa autenticação (planilha pública)
gs4_deauth()

# Link da planilha
url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1C8iaK5cIXu5h20At5pnALHRMY-g716--GfRJEfmHf3M/edit"

# Lê a aba
cronograma <- read_sheet(url, sheet = "cronograma_anete")

# Formata data
cronograma <- cronograma %>%
  mutate(Data = format(as.Date(Data), "%d/%m/%Y"))

# Tabela
kable(
  cronograma,
  caption = "Cronograma de encontros da disciplina",
  align = "clll"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = TRUE,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive")
  ) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "7em", bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "22em") %>%
  column_spec(3, width = "20em") %>%
  column_spec(4, width = "28em")
```
